basics.name: CHEN Yanxin
basics.label: Ph.D. Student in Artificial Intelligence
basics.summary: Ph.D. student in Artificial Intelligence at Fudan University, focusing on long video understanding, video large models, retrieval-augmented generation, and large-scale VLM training infrastructure.

work.summary: Large-scale VLM pretraining and SFT workflow.
highlights: Responsible for four-stage pretraining and the full SFT workflow, including ablation experiments and formal training runs.
Experienced with thousand-GPU cluster training and debugging training-framework, data, NCCL communication, and deadlock issues.

publications.name: ProEchoMem: Enhancing Long Video Understanding via Multi-Trace Probe-Echo Memory
publications.summary: Co-first author. Proposed the PN-RAG framework for probe generation, structured annotation, and fine-grained reranking in long-video understanding.
